premium_mechanics.spawn_rate: ~2% per day after last premium (max ~14% after a week)
premium_mechanics.notification: Maximum urgency - glowing compact, special sound
premium_mechanics.psychological_impact: Missing these hurts 10x more than regular brooms

player_psychology.week_1: Cool, maybe I'll save for a premium if one appears
player_psychology.week_2: Actually, any flying broom would be nice...
player_psychology.caught_premium: Best moment in the game. Worth every penny.

economic_impact.decision_pressure: Do I wait for premium or buy ugly one now?
economic_impact.opportunity_cost: Save for premium = more days walking
economic_impact.regret_potential: What if I never see another premium?
